_comment: Seed list for Bird Cam Streamer v0.1. activeMonths is a 1-indexed array hinting when each stream is typically live; it's a fallback for when no YouTube API key is configured. Omit the field for year-round streams. The YouTube Data API result (if available) always overrides this hint. If a stream stops loading, replace the videoId via the '+' tile.

streams.name: Cornell FeederWatch
streams.description: Sapsucker Woods, Ithaca, NY — chickadees, cardinals, pileated woodpeckers at the Treman feeding garden.

streams.name: Panama Fruit Feeder
streams.description: Canopy Lodge, El Valle de Antón — tanagers, oropendolas, toucans, 90+ species recorded.

streams.name: Panama Hummingbird Feeder
streams.description: Canopy Tower, Soberanía National Park, Panama — colorful tropical hummingbirds.

streams.name: Big Bear Eagles (Nest)
streams.description: Jackie and Shadow's nest, 145 feet up a pine in the San Bernardino Mountains, California.

streams.name: Big Bear Eagles (Wide)
streams.description: Wider view of Jackie and Shadow's territory — great for arrivals, departures, and weather.

streams.name: Catalina Bald Eagles
streams.description: West End of Catalina Island, California — eagle pair Haku and Makaio at a nest active since 1991.

streams.name: Catalina Bald Eagles (Low)
streams.description: Low-angle cam at the West End Catalina nest.

streams.name: Cornell Red-tailed Hawks
streams.description: Big Red and Arthur's nest atop a light pole on Cornell's campus.

streams.name: Hellgate Ospreys
streams.description: Iris and her mates at the mouth of Hellgate Canyon, Missoula, Montana.

streams.name: Northern Royal Albatross
streams.description: Taiaroa Head, New Zealand — the only mainland albatross colony in the Southern Hemisphere.
streams.source: Cornell Lab + NZ Dept. of Conservation

streams.name: American Kestrel
streams.description: Wisconsin kestrel nest box — small but fierce North American falcon.

streams.name: Wild Birds Unlimited Barred Owls
streams.description: Backyard barred owl nest box near Indianapolis, Indiana.

streams.name: Lance-tailed Manakins
streams.description: Isla Boca Brava, Panama — male manakins performing cooperative courtship dances on a lek perch.

streams.name: Great Horned Owls (Athena)
streams.description: Lady Bird Johnson Wildflower Center, Austin, TX — Athena nests in a sotol planter above the courtyard.

streams.name: Berry College Eagles
streams.description: Bald eagle nest in a tall pine at Berry College, Mount Berry, Georgia.

streams.name: Panama Fruit Feeder (Explore)
streams.description: Alternate stream of the Canopy Lodge fruit feeder via Explore.org.

streams.name: Hog Island Ospreys
streams.description: Maine osprey nest on Audubon's Hog Island — chick rearing and fishing dives.

streams.name: Atlantic Puffins (Seal Island)
streams.description: Seal Island, Maine — Atlantic puffins on the 'loafing ledge' where the colony gathers.

streams.name: Decorah Eagles
streams.description: Iconic bald eagle nest near the Decorah fish hatchery, Iowa.

streams.name: Decorah North Eagles
streams.description: Decorah North nest, also in Iowa — second long-running Raptor Resource Project eagle cam.

streams.name: Great Horned Owl (Montana)
streams.description: Wild Great Horned Owl nest in Montana via Explore.org's nature network.

streams.name: Bermuda Cahow (Burrow 1)
streams.description: Nonsuch Island, Bermuda — underground burrow cam of the critically endangered Bermuda Petrel, once thought extinct for 300 years.

streams.name: Loch Garten Ospreys
streams.description: Abernethy Forest, Scottish Highlands — the original RSPB osprey nest where UK ospreys recolonised in 1954.

streams.name: Loch of the Lowes Ospreys
streams.description: Perthshire, Scotland — Scottish Wildlife Trust's long-running osprey nest cam, currently with returning female NC0.

streams.name: Estonian White-tailed Eagle
streams.description: Matsalu National Park, Estonia — Eagle Club's long-running merikotkas nest, active every year since 1996.

streams.name: Estonian Golden Eagle
streams.description: Northern Estonia — Eagle Club's kaljukotkas (golden eagle) nest in a remote boreal forest.

streams.name: Sydney Sea-Eagles
streams.description: Newington Armory, Sydney Olympic Park — White-bellied Sea-Eagle nest 50ft up a eucalyptus, run by BirdLife Australia.

streams.name: Australian Bird Cams (Wollongong)
streams.description: Wollongong, NSW — backyard cam streaming wild galahs, cockatoos, lorikeets and possums on the NSW south coast.

streams.name: Kakapo Cam (Rakiura)
streams.description: Whenua Hou / Codfish Island, New Zealand — underground burrow cam of Rakiura the kakapo, the world's heaviest parrot.

streams.name: Tembe Elephant Park
streams.description: KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa — Maputaland waterhole with 340+ bird species including vultures, hornbills, fish eagles.

streams.name: Wild Africa Live (Tau Waterhole)
streams.description: Madikwe Game Reserve, South Africa — 24/7 Africam waterhole stream; over 300 bird species including the Tau vulture restaurant.

streams.name: Fotherdale Barn Owls (Robert E Fuller)
streams.description: Yorkshire Wolds, UK — multi-cam view of wild barn owls, kestrels, stoats and tawny owls at wildlife artist Robert E Fuller's reserve.

streams.name: Ash Wood Tawny Owls (Robert E Fuller)
streams.description: Yorkshire, UK — wild tawny owls, kestrels and buzzards in an ancient woodland nest box network.

streams.name: Sachatamia Hummingbirds (Ecuador)
streams.description: Mindo cloud forest, Pichincha, Ecuador — feeder station for one of the planet's richest hummingbird communities (130+ species).
